description: This file defines how item modifiers work. It takes a stat defined from itemstatcost and uses a function to handle the stat's "min", "max" and "parameter" values. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: code
columns.description: Defines the property ID. Used as a reference in other data files (this should not be changed)

columns.name: func1
columns.description: Code function used to define the Property. Uses numeric ID values to define what function to use.

columns.name: stat1
columns.description: Stat applied by the property. Used by the .func# field as a possible parameter. A stat is comprised of a "min" and "max" value which it uses to calculate the actual numeric value. Stats also can have a "parameter" value, depending on its function.

columns.name: set1
columns.description: Boolean field. Used by the .func# field as a possible parameter. If equals 1, then set the stat value regardless of its current value. If equals 0, then add to the stat value.

columns.name: val1
columns.description: Integer field. sed by the .func# field as a possible input parameter for additional function calculations

columns.name: uiRangeType
columns.description: Range type associated with the property. Is used in the Chronicle when defining the min/max stat values based on the Property's Min/Max and Param values
